calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-11-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Petitioner, Steven Melbourne Tanape present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Lee Ann Rose Tanape.
Decree signed in open court.
